behaviors.description: Speech-to-text preserves speaker labels needed for attendee attribution.
behaviors.justification: Failure depends on real speech-to-text model diarization quality (AI/ML output), not just local wiring. A stubbed transcript would hide mislabeled speakers. Rejected Workflow because behavior text targets one model-output boundary: "speech-to-text output preserves speaker labels".
behaviors.test_description: Send a real multi-speaker meeting audio clip to the production STT API and assert transcript segments contain correct speaker labels for each speaker turn (and that labels are usable for downstream attribution).

behaviors.description: Transcript parsing extracts explicit task assignments (assignee + task text) into summary input structure.
behaviors.justification: Behavior is deterministic parsing/mapping logic on transcript text and schema shape; no explicit real infra or model-output dependence is required by the behavior text.
behaviors.test_description: Given transcript fixtures containing explicit assignments (e.g., "Alex, send the deck by Friday"), assert parser returns structured items with correct assignee and task text.

behaviors.description: Live summary includes at least one action item for every attendee who was assigned a task.
behaviors.justification: Correctness depends on what the summarizing LLM includes/omits in generated action items. Deterministic mocks would always pass presence checks and miss real omission failures. Rejected Workflow because this behavior can be validated at one model decision point (summary generation from prepared transcript input).
behaviors.test_description: Feed a transcript with multiple explicit assignments to the real summarization model and assert each assigned attendee appears at least once in action items.

behaviors.description: Decision extraction routes identified decisions into `decisions` schema instead of narrative fields.
behaviors.justification: This is routing/mapping logic after decisions are already identified; behavior text is about correct field placement, which is deterministic and local.
behaviors.test_description: Pass identified-decision objects into routing function and assert outputs populate `decisions` array/section and do not land in generic narrative fields.

behaviors.description: Key transcript decisions appear in summary `decisions` section, not buried in narrative.
behaviors.justification: This checks model output quality/content placement from transcript to generated summary. A stubbed model response cannot reveal real misses where the model narrates but fails schema-specific decision extraction.
behaviors.test_description: Submit real transcript examples containing explicit decisions to the real summarization model and assert those decisions are present in `decisions` section and absent as only narrative mentions.

behaviors.description: For audio longer than 60 minutes, service segments, processes sequentially, and merges into one coherent summary.
behaviors.justification: Behavior explicitly requires multi-step sequential processing with state handoff across segments (split -> process segment(s) -> merge). With LLM/STT-driven segment processing, real failure appears in chained agentic steps and merge coherence. Rejected Agentic because text requires sequence orchestration: "processes them sequentially, merging the results".
behaviors.test_description: Run a >60-minute real meeting recording through production pipeline; verify segment boundaries are created, processed in order, and merged output is structurally complete and cross-segment coherent.

behaviors.description: End-to-end pipeline (upload, transcribe, summarize, deliver structured output) completes automatically for a real meeting recording.
behaviors.justification: Behavior text is full pipeline orchestration with real recording and no manual intervention, spanning multiple stages including AI steps. Real failures emerge at cross-stage handoffs and sequencing; lower levels cannot expose this complete-path failure boundary.
behaviors.test_description: Execute an end-to-end run with a real meeting audio file through production-like path (upload -> STT -> summarization -> delivery) and assert successful completion plus valid structured output schema.
